subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Once again have the traditions born of vain imaginings returned. That which the people of the Qur'an wrought, the people of the Bayán have likewise done [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی رجعت احادیث الاوهام مره اخری آنچه حزب فرقان عمل نمودند حزب بیان بهمان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant
